epigraph.quote: So dark at night that Simon saw a shooting star + opened his constellations app on his mob.

moments.quote: I rang Kate when a road sign said "Woking" + left a message... We slept on the drive + left at 7.20.
got to the Channel Tunnel early + the train was 50 minutes late
We cycled to the cemetery + to the next village with 2 stations, one for modern, one for old trains.
We went west, though Picardy into Normany, stopping at a roadside restaurant a few miles east of Caen.
The shower works by just pulling on a chain. We are 10 k west of Mont St. Michel.

images.caption: Avec l'assurance de nos prières près de Saint-Yves

moments.quote: We bought Far Breton in the cake shop in honours of Fatana who gave me the recipe many years ago.
The rocks in this poking-up bit of Brittany are amazing, very like Mahabalipuram. Pink granite worn away in parts. Balancing.
Very friendly woman who gave us a bag of veg for free.
One of the statues had 2 horses doing a pooh.
allowed us to choose the pitch lovely views of grass-covered dunes + distant town + + boat masts.

images.caption: St. Thégonnec, Renaissance Ossuary Chapel + entombment in oak in crypt.
Big polished axes discovered at Carnac, Alpine jadite, Neolithic, 4500-4000 av. JC

moments.quote: After supper there was an amazing rainbow as the sun came out & the sky cleared. We went for a lovely walk along the beach — a beautiful pink lilac sky.
At 8.30. we went to a fabulous organ concert in the Church by Prof Mickael Gaborieau. Really amazing.
One woman had a washing machine + tumble drier on a huge wooden pallette outside.
we looked at the town + newly laid wreaths.
It's raining in Montormel / And yet, it's summer ; / Heaven is weeping over events former.
A beautiful old town. I'd like to walk here.
We left at 8.35. For Charleval + petrol [?Salon]... We reached the train on time & had lunch in the train.
We reached the train on time & had lunch in the train.
On to Whittlesey St., where I knocked very loudly on the door... After a night & lunch with the William Kirby we set off for [?Tinds] on the way home.
